flashcards.definition: A substance that donates H⁺ ions (Arrhenius) or protons (Brønsted-Lowry) in solution.
A substance that donates OH⁻ ions (Arrhenius) or accepts protons (Brønsted-Lowry).
Acid: produces H⁺ in water. Base: produces OH⁻ in water.
Acid: proton (H⁺) donor. Base: proton acceptor.
A substance that can act as both an acid and a base (e.g., water).
